# bundleIdentifier

**Instance Property**

The unique bundle identifier of the app.

## Declaration

```swift
var bundleIdentifier: String { get }
```

## Inspecting an app

- **processID**: The system process identifier of the app.
- **applicationName**: The display name of the app.
